facebook.caption: Sitting right on 1 Võ Thị Sáu in the heart of Phú Quốc, Huong Bien Restaurant has earned a seriously loyal following, 4.7 out of 5 stars across 758 reviews. This is the kind of Vietnamese seafood spot where the menu feels honest and the portions feel generous. Fresh catches, classic preparations, and a crowd that clearly keeps coming back. Practical tip: arrive before 7 pm to beat the dinner rush and snag a comfortable table.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the dishes land on the table at Huong Bien Restaurant and you will understand exactly why 758 reviewers gave it a 4.7. The colours, the steam, the seafood pulled straight from Phú Quốc waters. This is Vietnamese coastal cooking doing exactly what it does best.

instagram.caption: Huong Bien Restaurant in Phú Quốc, 4.7 stars from 758 reviews and a plate of seafood that needs zero filter. Fresh, local, and deeply satisfying. Get there before 7 pm for the best seat in the house.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh seafood, 758 happy reviewers, and a 4.7-star rating that speaks for itself. Huong Bien Restaurant is giving Phú Quốc coastal dining its best look yet.

tiktok.caption: 758 reviews and a 4.7 rating at Huong Bien Restaurant in Phú Quốc. This is the seafood spot you did not know you needed. #PhuQuoc #VietnamFood #SeafoodLovers #PhuQuocEats

scenes: Located at 1 Võ Thị Sáu, Phú Quốc
